holdings.infoBox: EGGY is an equity ETF with a total of 36 individual holdings. The top holdings are First American Government Obligations Fund Class X stock at 14.18%, Seagate Technology Holdings at 11.35%, Bloom Energy at 8.57%, Micron Technology at 7.00%, and Lumentum Holdings at 6.44%.

overview.description: The NestYield Dynamic Income ETF (EGGY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is actively managed investing in US large cap equities directly and synthetically. The fund employs options strategies to generate income and hedge downside risks using a laddered put options strategy. EGGY was launched on Dec 26, 2024 and is issued by NestYield.
